objective: Produce exactly one positive witness at artifacts/sidon-a24-improvement.witness.txt. The supplied target packet contains a verified 7,192-point seed and the complete output contract. Return engine status success only if the artifact contains more than 7,192 distinct 24-bit points and you have independently checked that every componentwise integer pair sum for i<=j is distinct. A null or failed result is valid if no improvement is found, but do not create a success artifact in that case. Do not claim maximality, classification, or universal nonexistence.
completion_condition: The frozen capsule parses the exact six-line artifact, requires more than 7,192 distinct vectors, and independently sorts and duplicate-checks all m(m+1)/2 componentwise pair sums in a separate network-denied and write-denied container.
